overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking from a dark concrete underpass out onto a sunny beach area with a futuristic city skyline in the background, then returning to the underpass. The clip features high-quality game graphics with bright midday lighting and warm sandy tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass beneath highway with debris

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dark underpass toward the bright exit and beach beyond

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with exposed steel beams creating deep shadow
damaged red sedan with missing doors and broken windows parked under the overpass
thick structural support column for the overpass
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible through the overpass opening

segments.scene_description: The player begins beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in deep shadow. An abandoned red car sits to the right while the bright beach and distant futuristic city skyline are visible ahead through the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered walkway to open beachfront

events.description: exits the deep shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight causing exposure adjustment
moves from the sheltered concrete underpass onto the open sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking out from the dark concrete structure onto the sunlit beach with increasing pace

entered.detail: expansive golden sandy beach stretching toward the waterfront
scattered palm trees lining the edge of the beach area

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark underpass into bright midday sunlight on the sandy beach. The heavy concrete structure falls behind as the open waterfront and detailed city skyline come into full view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with distant urban skyline and construction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the sandy beach toward the distant buildings and palm trees

entered.detail: elevated wooden observation structure with stairs on the beach
industrial cranes atop unfinished skyscrapers in the city background
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The player continues across the open beach, passing a wooden lifeguard tower on the left. The futuristic city skyline dominates the background with visible construction cranes, while graffiti-covered walls and palm trees line the right side of the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with wooden shacks and concrete infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden beach structures and concrete ramp leading back to the overpass

entered.detail: steep concrete staircase and ramp leading up to the highway overpass
small weathered wooden building with open sides on the sand

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the far end of the beach where wooden shacks and a concrete ramp become prominent. The ramp on the right provides access back to the overpass level while the player moves closer to the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to concrete underpass beneath highway

events.description: re-enters the deep shadow of the concrete overpass from bright sunlight
moves from open beach back into the covered underpass area

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking back under the dark overpass toward the abandoned vehicle

entered.detail: the same damaged red vehicle now approached from the front under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player turns right and re-enters the dark concrete underpass, leaving the beach behind. The abandoned red car comes back into view as the player approaches it from the front, ending the clip beneath the shadowy highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the deep shadows of a concrete underpass out onto a sun-drenched beach before returning to the darkness. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass beside an abandoned red car, moving forward as the dim light gives way to bright midday sunlight. As the camera emerges from the structure, the scene expands into an open waterfront where a futuristic city skyline with construction cranes dominates the horizon, passing a wooden lifeguard tower and graffiti-covered walls lined with palm trees. The view then shifts toward the far end of the beach, approaching wooden shacks and a concrete ramp that leads back toward the elevated highway. Finally, the camera turns right to re-enter the shadowy underpass, leaving the bright coastline behind as it closes in on the front of the abandoned red car.
